message:
feat(modal): harden focus trap lifecycle, mid-stack removal, and return-focus retargeting

Significant improvements to how the modal focus coordinator manages
traps, especially for mid-stack modal removals and edge cases around
empty focus groups:

- create_group_preserving_members: new variant that avoids clobbering
  existing group members when re-establishing a trap
- pop_id_with_restore_retarget: when removing a modal from mid-stack,
  retarget the next-upper modal's return focus to the removed modal's
  effective return focus, preventing orphaned focus targets
- Guard against false negatives when a trap is pushed for a group with
  declared members but no currently-focusable ones (has_declared_members
  check prevents premature group teardown)
- clear_deferred_focus_if_excluded: on modal close, clear any deferred
  focus target that belonged to the closing modal's group
- refresh_inactive_modal_return_focus_targets: after focus repair,
  re-validate return focus targets for all remaining modals
- Fix: only capture base_focus when transitioning from untrapped to
  trapped state (was_trapped && trapped guard)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
